description: Daily coach log. Append only. Each entry is one business day. Query by date, workstream, activity_type, flags, customer_calls, etc.

entries.headline: Busy day across product, engineering, and customer calls.

activities.name: Cash balances page redesign — flat table + bar chart concept
activities.description: Reviewed the cash balances homepage redesign with Tom in the weekly customer sync: flat filterable table plus a stacked bar chart and KPI cards. Agreed the page could replace the need for a separate summary report.

activities.name: Docs platform comparison posted to team channel
activities.description: Completed a comparison of two documentation platforms and posted a recommendation with tradeoffs to the team channel.

activities.name: Investment data ingestion firefight — incorrect past balances
activities.description: Customer investment data was not updating correctly. Traced to a scheduled report bug and coordinated a fix with engineering.

activities.name: Career development check-in
activities.description: Discussed role scope and growth areas with manager.

entries.headline: Follow-up day: tickets created from yesterday's calls, a root-cause investigation, and a partner evaluation call.

activities.name: Customer pain point tracking system designed
activities.description: Designed a workflow to centralize customer pain points captured from meeting notes into the issue tracker.

activities.name: Partner evaluation call — no meeting notes captured
activities.description: Call with a prospective connectivity partner. Notes were not captured automatically, so a summary was shared with the team afterward.
activities.artifact: Summary shared in team DM, Apr 2

activities.name: Duplicate transaction root-cause investigation
activities.description: Investigated duplicate transactions reported by a customer and traced the issue to an upstream vendor sync pattern.

activities.name: Customer trust issue flagged
activities.description: Flagged that a customer is losing trust in a recent feature change and escalated for follow-up.
